texts.label: text
texts.orig: Situated  on  the  shores  of  the  Mida  Creek  and  the  Indian Ocean,  surrounded  in  lush  greenery,  with  access  to  two semi-private beaches and walking distance to larger public beaches.
texts.text: Situated  on  the  shores  of  the  Mida  Creek  and  the  Indian Ocean,  surrounded  in  lush  greenery,  with  access  to  two semi-private beaches and walking distance to larger public beaches.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Located  in  front  of  the  Mida  Creek  and  its  beautiful mangroves, these standard rooms come equipped with a shower, bidet, hair dryer, cosmetic mirror, air conditioner, ceiling fan, mosquito net, shared terrace or balcony, safe, WiFi.  These  rooms  are  decorated  in  a    traditional  way with bold African prints and darker wood and come with double or twin beds.
texts.text: Located  in  front  of  the  Mida  Creek  and  its  beautiful mangroves, these standard rooms come equipped with a shower, bidet, hair dryer, cosmetic mirror, air conditioner, ceiling fan, mosquito net, shared terrace or balcony, safe, WiFi.  These  rooms  are  decorated  in  a    traditional  way with bold African prints and darker wood and come with double or twin beds.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our Boutique Rooms are located in our botanical garden with more than 3000 plants, trees and African wildlife. In addition  to  the  amenities  in  the  Cozy  rooms,  Boutique rooms have a coffee & tea station, kettle, desk, chair and wardrobe. These rooms are light, bright and are great for families as each room has a double & a single bed.
texts.text: Our Boutique Rooms are located in our botanical garden with more than 3000 plants, trees and African wildlife. In addition  to  the  amenities  in  the  Cozy  rooms,  Boutique rooms have a coffee & tea station, kettle, desk, chair and wardrobe. These rooms are light, bright and are great for families as each room has a double & a single bed.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Located directly in front of the Mida Creek with views of either the creek, the mangroves, or our botanical garden. Our  newly  renovated  Deluxe  rooms  come  with  the above  amenities,  exclusive  of  desk  and  chair,  and  a deluxe vanity set. These rooms are in neutral colours in a boho meets Swahili style. All rooms feature double beds.
texts.text: Located directly in front of the Mida Creek with views of either the creek, the mangroves, or our botanical garden. Our  newly  renovated  Deluxe  rooms  come  with  the above  amenities,  exclusive  of  desk  and  chair,  and  a deluxe vanity set. These rooms are in neutral colours in a boho meets Swahili style. All rooms feature double beds.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: 2  saltwater  pools,  2  sundecks,  sunbeds  and  sunshades  at the  pools  and  at  our  private  Temple  Beach  set  atop  our small cliffside with stairs to Tiny Beach, outdoor cinema, à  la  carte  restaurant,  sunset  bar  with  panorama  terrace, main pool bar, Bazaar bar, LichtHaus bar, gym, spa (manicure, pedicure, massage), boutique, co-working space, conference areas, billiards, free wifi.
texts.text: 2  saltwater  pools,  2  sundecks,  sunbeds  and  sunshades  at the  pools  and  at  our  private  Temple  Beach  set  atop  our small cliffside with stairs to Tiny Beach, outdoor cinema, à  la  carte  restaurant,  sunset  bar  with  panorama  terrace, main pool bar, Bazaar bar, LichtHaus bar, gym, spa (manicure, pedicure, massage), boutique, co-working space, conference areas, billiards, free wifi.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Accommodation with bed-only, breakfast and half board. buffet options available at Sunset Restaurant. À la carte dining available for an additional charge.
texts.text: Accommodation with bed-only, breakfast and half board. buffet options available at Sunset Restaurant. À la carte dining available for an additional charge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Beach volleyball, billiards, table tennis, gym.
texts.text: Beach volleyball, billiards, table tennis, gym.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Scuba  diving,  kite  surfing,  gym,  personal  training  and group classes, pilates, yoga, guided SUP and canoe tours into  the  mangrove  forest,  snorkeling.  Deep  sea  fishing can be organized by our local partners.
texts.text: Scuba  diving,  kite  surfing,  gym,  personal  training  and group classes, pilates, yoga, guided SUP and canoe tours into  the  mangrove  forest,  snorkeling.  Deep  sea  fishing can be organized by our local partners.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Weekend outdoor cinema, dancing at LichtHaus bar.
texts.text: Weekend outdoor cinema, dancing at LichtHaus bar.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Tsavo East National Park, Maasai Mara, Mida Creek birds Arabuko  Sokoke  coastal  forest,  sunken  city  of  Gede, Marafa 'Hell's  Kitchen',  Malindi,  Lake  Nakuru,  Amboseli, Lumo  Conservancy,  and  custom  itineraries  in  all  other national parks.
texts.text: Tsavo East National Park, Maasai Mara, Mida Creek birds Arabuko  Sokoke  coastal  forest,  sunken  city  of  Gede, Marafa 'Hell's  Kitchen',  Malindi,  Lake  Nakuru,  Amboseli, Lumo  Conservancy,  and  custom  itineraries  in  all  other national parks.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Due  to  tides,  swimming  in  the  creek  may  be  restricted and strong current may occur. Swimming at short beach is possible at all times and tides.
texts.text: Due  to  tides,  swimming  in  the  creek  may  be  restricted and strong current may occur. Swimming at short beach is possible at all times and tides.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Further information such as wedding, honeymoon specials as well as conference packages available upon request, season dependent.
texts.text: Further information such as wedding, honeymoon specials as well as conference packages available upon request, season dependent.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Temple  Point Resort is an oasis of adventure  and relaxation  with  direct  access  to  two  pristine,  fine  sandy beaches.  It  is  uniquely  nestled  between  the  Watamu Marine National Park and the birds paradise Mida Creek on the top of the peninsula of Watamu where the Indian Ocean meets the Mida Creek.
texts.text: Temple  Point Resort is an oasis of adventure  and relaxation  with  direct  access  to  two  pristine,  fine  sandy beaches.  It  is  uniquely  nestled  between  the  Watamu Marine National Park and the birds paradise Mida Creek on the top of the peninsula of Watamu where the Indian Ocean meets the Mida Creek.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The MOI Mombasa International Airport is 120km away and the Malindi Airport is 20km from the hotel.
texts.text: The MOI Mombasa International Airport is 120km away and the Malindi Airport is 20km from the hotel.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Tsavo East National Park is just a 1.5h drive away.
texts.text: Tsavo East National Park is just a 1.5h drive away.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Spread over a 50,000 sqm botanical garden, 16 individually built chalets highlight the beauty of traditional  Kenyan  coastal  architecture  featuring  white exteriors  and  bold  makuti  roofs.  The  lush  creekfront property is adorned by colorful plants and tropical flowers.  The  heart  of  Temple  Point  is  found  at  the modern  Bazaar  featuring  a  pool,  boutique,  bar,  open kitchen  restaurant,  weekend  cinema,  co-working  space, and occasional events, styled with colorful hanging glass lanterns, surrounded by palm trees, fragrant frangipani's, and playful monkeys.
texts.text: Spread over a 50,000 sqm botanical garden, 16 individually built chalets highlight the beauty of traditional  Kenyan  coastal  architecture  featuring  white exteriors  and  bold  makuti  roofs.  The  lush  creekfront property is adorned by colorful plants and tropical flowers.  The  heart  of  Temple  Point  is  found  at  the modern  Bazaar  featuring  a  pool,  boutique,  bar,  open kitchen  restaurant,  weekend  cinema,  co-working  space, and occasional events, styled with colorful hanging glass lanterns, surrounded by palm trees, fragrant frangipani's, and playful monkeys.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The resort has 64 rooms. Each of the chalets houses 3 - 8 rooms, provided with either a shared terrace or balcony.
texts.text: The resort has 64 rooms. Each of the chalets houses 3 - 8 rooms, provided with either a shared terrace or balcony.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All  rooms  offer  a  modern  bathroom  with  hairdryer, toiletries and body care products, air conditioner, mosquito net, safe, and ceiling fan.
texts.text: All  rooms  offer  a  modern  bathroom  with  hairdryer, toiletries and body care products, air conditioner, mosquito net, safe, and ceiling fan.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All rooms are nonsmoking, some rooms are dog friendly.
texts.text: All rooms are nonsmoking, some rooms are dog friendly.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Temple Point explores the relationship between art, food, and beverage by pushing boundaries, introducing playful twists  to  classic  cocktails,  and  being  fearless  with  daily specials and their ingredients.
texts.text: Temple Point explores the relationship between art, food, and beverage by pushing boundaries, introducing playful twists  to  classic  cocktails,  and  being  fearless  with  daily specials and their ingredients.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Bazaar  Restaurant  and  Bar is  an  open  kitchen restaurant  featuring  international  à  la  carte  lunch  and dinner menus with a Kenyan twist.
texts.text: The Bazaar  Restaurant  and  Bar is  an  open  kitchen restaurant  featuring  international  à  la  carte  lunch  and dinner menus with a Kenyan twist.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The famous LichtHaus Restaurant and Bar is also on the property where  guests can enjoy lunch and dinner skewers and a wide range of beverages while relaxing in hammocks over the Mida Creek.
texts.text: The famous LichtHaus Restaurant and Bar is also on the property where  guests can enjoy lunch and dinner skewers and a wide range of beverages while relaxing in hammocks over the Mida Creek.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sunset Restaurant and Bar welcomes guests to our main lobby  area  overlooking  the  main  pool  and  Mida  Creek. Aptly  named,  the  location  invites  guests  to  enjoy  a refreshing cocktail while watching the sunset over Mida Creek. This is where the board inclusive breakfast, lunch, and dinner buffets are served.
texts.text: Sunset Restaurant and Bar welcomes guests to our main lobby  area  overlooking  the  main  pool  and  Mida  Creek. Aptly  named,  the  location  invites  guests  to  enjoy  a refreshing cocktail while watching the sunset over Mida Creek. This is where the board inclusive breakfast, lunch, and dinner buffets are served.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The property's Pool Bar is  located  at  the  main pool and services guests with a selection of refreshing beverages.
texts.text: The property's Pool Bar is  located  at  the  main pool and services guests with a selection of refreshing beverages.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Spoken languages: Swahili, English, German, Italian
texts.text: Spoken languages: Swahili, English, German, Italian

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Accepted credit cards: Master and Visa
texts.text: Accepted credit cards: Master and Visa

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Sunbathe and swim in our 2 saltwater pools, relax on our sundecks equipped with optional shading or at our man made Temple Beach right next to our temple. Please note this beach is located on our small cliffside with stairs to the semi-private Tiny Beach. Other free sporting facilities available:  beach  volleyball,    table  tennis,  billiards,  gym, outdoor cinema.
texts.text: Sunbathe and swim in our 2 saltwater pools, relax on our sundecks equipped with optional shading or at our man made Temple Beach right next to our temple. Please note this beach is located on our small cliffside with stairs to the semi-private Tiny Beach. Other free sporting facilities available:  beach  volleyball,    table  tennis,  billiards,  gym, outdoor cinema.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Yoga,  personal  training  and  group  classes  at  the  gym, stand-up  paddle  board  (SUP)  and  canoe  tour  on  Mida Creek  and  through  the  mangrove  forest,  snorkeling, guided  trips  through  Watamu,  Gede,  Arabuko  Sokoke forest, scuba diving, kite surfing rentals.
texts.text: Yoga,  personal  training  and  group  classes  at  the  gym, stand-up  paddle  board  (SUP)  and  canoe  tour  on  Mida Creek  and  through  the  mangrove  forest,  snorkeling, guided  trips  through  Watamu,  Gede,  Arabuko  Sokoke forest, scuba diving, kite surfing rentals.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Deep-sea fishing on the Indian Ocean.
texts.text: Deep-sea fishing on the Indian Ocean.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our on-site dive center by Extra Divers offers basic and advanced SSI and PADI certifications and daily dive trips. Explore  the    underwater  world  of  the  Watamu  Marine National Park where divers discover its still faultless coral reef  with  colorful  fish,  rays,  whales,  dolphins,  octopus, 140 species of coral, and much more!
texts.text: Our on-site dive center by Extra Divers offers basic and advanced SSI and PADI certifications and daily dive trips. Explore  the    underwater  world  of  the  Watamu  Marine National Park where divers discover its still faultless coral reef  with  colorful  fish,  rays,  whales,  dolphins,  octopus, 140 species of coral, and much more!

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  average  water  temp  is  between  24-28°C,  with depths  between  8  and  40  meters,  visibility  5-20m  and dive  sites  being  between  20  and  40  minutes  away  by boat.  The  dive  center  offers  daily  morning  trips  with double dives, as well as afternoon & night dives.
texts.text: The  average  water  temp  is  between  24-28°C,  with depths  between  8  and  40  meters,  visibility  5-20m  and dive  sites  being  between  20  and  40  minutes  away  by boat.  The  dive  center  offers  daily  morning  trips  with double dives, as well as afternoon & night dives.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The dive center is closed in May and June.
texts.text: The dive center is closed in May and June.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Home  to  54  National  Parks,  Kenya  is  a  treasure  for nature and animal lovers.
texts.text: Home  to  54  National  Parks,  Kenya  is  a  treasure  for nature and animal lovers.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The  gate  of  Tsavo  East  National  Park  can  be  reached within an hour and a half, making it a great location for a quick  1.5  days  safari.  Lumo  Conservancy  near  Tsavo West  is  situated  right  in  the  elephant  migratory  path between the two parks, and we arrange custom itineraries to all other National Parks.
texts.text: The  gate  of  Tsavo  East  National  Park  can  be  reached within an hour and a half, making it a great location for a quick  1.5  days  safari.  Lumo  Conservancy  near  Tsavo West  is  situated  right  in  the  elephant  migratory  path between the two parks, and we arrange custom itineraries to all other National Parks.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Gede Ruins, a historical and cultural site within Watamu, offers visitors the opportunity to learn about the history and  previous  economic  classes  of  Watamu.  Arabuko Sokoke  Forest  offers  visitors  the  opportunity  to  come face  to  face  with  the  elephants  of  the  forest  while enjoying  sunset  snacks  at  the  watering  hole.  Snorkel  in the  Mida  Creek  or  watch  dolphins  from  the  netted hammock aboard the resort's boat or intimate dhow.
texts.text: Gede Ruins, a historical and cultural site within Watamu, offers visitors the opportunity to learn about the history and  previous  economic  classes  of  Watamu.  Arabuko Sokoke  Forest  offers  visitors  the  opportunity  to  come face  to  face  with  the  elephants  of  the  forest  while enjoying  sunset  snacks  at  the  watering  hole.  Snorkel  in the  Mida  Creek  or  watch  dolphins  from  the  netted hammock aboard the resort's boat or intimate dhow.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The climate is tropical with high air humidity and cooling monsoon  winds.  The  temperature  averages  between 25°C and 30°C and up to 32°C from November to April.
texts.text: The climate is tropical with high air humidity and cooling monsoon  winds.  The  temperature  averages  between 25°C and 30°C and up to 32°C from November to April.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In Kenya, the long rainy season in May and June differs from  the  short rains  season  at  end  of  October  to December.  There  may  be  no  rain  in  the  short  season while  during  the  long  rain  season  there  may  be  short heavy rains.
texts.text: In Kenya, the long rainy season in May and June differs from  the  short rains  season  at  end  of  October  to December.  There  may  be  no  rain  in  the  short  season while  during  the  long  rain  season  there  may  be  short heavy rains.
